on_entry: /execute if score gamemode config matches 21 as @a[tag=!random2join] at @s if score random2team joincount matches 20.. if block ~ ~-3 ~ diamond_ore run playsound note.bass @s
/execute if score gamemode config matches 21 as @a[tag=!random2join] at @s if score random2team joincount matches 20.. if block ~ ~-3 ~ diamond_ore run title @s actionbar §c定員オーバーです
/execute if score gamemode config matches 21 as @a[tag=!random2join] at @s if score random2team joincount matches 20.. if block ~ ~-3 ~ diamond_ore run tp @s -1 -55 179 90 0
/execute if score gamemode config matches 21 as @a[tag=!random2join] at @s if score random2team joincount matches 20.. if block ~ ~-4 ~ diamond_ore run playsound note.bass @s
/execute if score gamemode config matches 21 as @a[tag=!random2join] at @s if score random2team joincount matches 20.. if block ~ ~-4 ~ diamond_ore run title @s actionbar §c定員オーバーです
/execute if score gamemode config matches 21 as @a[tag=!random2join] at @s if score random2team joincount matches 20.. if block ~ ~-4 ~ diamond_ore run tp @s -1 -55 179 90 0
/execute as @a[tag=random2join] at @s unless block ~ ~-3 ~ diamond_ore run tag @s remove random2join
/execute as @a[tag=random2join] at @s unless block ~ ~-4 ~ diamond_ore run tag @s remove random2join
/execute if score gamemode config matches 21 as @a[tag=!random2join] at @s if score random2team joincount matches ..19 if block ~ ~-3 ~ diamond_ore run tag @s add random2join
/execute if score gamemode config matches 21 as @a[tag=!random2join] at @s if score random2team joincount matches ..19 if block ~ ~-4 ~ diamond_ore run tag @s add random2join
/execute if score gamemode config matches 21 as @a[tag=random2join] run scoreboard players add random2team joincount 1
